meta_title: For Students: project management to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Project Management to Solve Debugging Woes
content.seo_description: Master advanced project management to overcome debugging roadblocks. Learn to use Antigravity and Claude Code to build professional-grade software efficiently.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't just about syntax; it's a structural failure. By implementing rigorous project management—breaking monoliths into isolated, testable modules—you reduce cognitive load. Utilize Antigravity for architectural visualization and Claude Code for iterative, context-aware bug resolution to transform your messy codebase into a streamlined, high-performance engine.
content.intro:
You stare at the screen, the cursor blinking rhythmically, mocking the tangled web of spaghetti code you’ve woven. You aren't just stuck; you're drowning in technical debt, and every 'fix' creates two new errors. This is the crucible every great engineer passes through, but you don't have to stay here.

True mastery isn't about being a human compiler; it's about orchestration. By shifting your focus from 'fixing bugs' to 'managing the system,' you reclaim your workflow. We are going to strip away the chaos using advanced project management patterns, integrating Antigravity for structural clarity and Claude Code for surgical precision.

steps.title: Architectural Decomposition
steps.description: Break your project into decoupled domains to isolate logic. This prevents bugs from cascading across your entire application.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze my current project structure and suggest a modular decomposition strategy to isolate core business logic from UI components.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'map the directory structure and suggest 3 domain-driven design improvements'

steps.title: State Flow Mapping
steps.description: Visualize how data moves through your app. Most bugs occur at the intersection of state transitions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a visual state transition diagram for my current data flow. Identify potential race conditions.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'trace the state lifecycle of the user authentication object'

steps.title: Unit Test Scaffolding
steps.description: Stop manual testing. Generate tests that define the 'expected' state of your functions.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of unit tests for the current module that covers edge cases and error boundaries.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate a jest test file for the current service layer'

steps.title: Automated Debugging Loops
steps.description: Use Claude Code to perform iterative 'fix-test-verify' cycles without manual intervention.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Set up a recursive debugging loop that monitors logs and suggests refactors based on error patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'monitor the logs and fix the null pointer exceptions in the data-parser module'

steps.title: Technical Debt Audit
steps.description: Review the code for long-term maintainability rather than just immediate functionality.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Perform a technical debt audit. Rank the top 3 files by complexity and suggest refactoring patterns.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'identify the most complex functions and suggest simplification via the strategy pattern'

pro_tips: Never fix a bug without writing a regression test first; if it isn't tested, it will come back.
Use Antigravity to visualize dependencies before you start coding to prevent circular imports.
Treat your error logs as data; use Claude Code to perform sentiment and pattern analysis on them.
Adopt 'Interface-First' development to ensure your modules are testable in isolation.
When stuck, force a 15-minute 'rubber ducking' session with Claude Code to explain the logic aloud.
content.next_steps: Once your project is stable, implement a CI/CD pipeline to automate the deployment process and ensure your new project management standards are enforced on every push.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start architecting your success. You have the tools, the strategy, and the roadmap to turn any project into a portfolio-ready asset. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
